title: New Currencies
body:
![New Currencies Logo](https://i.imgur.com/LCh2F0F.png)

**✅ Constant updates to the latest versions!\
⚖️ A Stable and Reliable Mod for Both Clients and Servers!\
📙 Report any issues with this mod via DMs!**
 

**_Current Coins and Banknotes_\
🪙 1€ and 2€\
💵 5€, 10€, 20€, 50€, 100€, 200€ and 500€\
🛠️ Coins and Banknotes can be converted in the Crafting Table!**

![MATTYTOMAS](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/e38f7b9b-512b-4d76-ba53-84ec791e63ac.png)
